description: Specialising in fashionable style, and crafted by skilled Indian craftsmen, murcia bags use the finest materials and hardware in their products. This stylish bag with its cut out detailing in the upper is a covetable piece. Carry this for a summer weekend away from work! The cut-out detailing and colours on this stylish piece playfully references girly fixation on floral themes and pink hues. Height: 34 cmWidth: 35 cmDepth: 12 cm Made of textured leatherette with cut-out patterning over sequin work on the front along with a metallic brand badge Two leatherette handles and a detachable and adjustable shoulder strap One main roomy compartment with a zippered pocket and two pouches Zippered pockets on the sides One zippered pocket on the back Bag care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
